user.title: LINE Bot
user.description: Enter your LINE Messaging API credentials. Both can be found in the LINE Developers Console under your channel's Basic settings tab.

webhook_info.title: Set Up Webhook
webhook_info.description:
Almost done. Copy the URL below and paste it into the LINE Developers Console.

**Webhook URL:**
`{webhook_url}`

1. In the LINE Developers Console, open your channel's Messaging API tab.
2. Under Webhook settings, paste the URL above.
3. Enable Use webhook.
4. Click Verify. It should return success.
5. Tick the checkbox below and click Submit.

After setup is complete, add recipients via the Settings gear icon on the integration card.

data.confirmed: I have set the webhook URL and verified it successfully

error.invalid_token: Could not verify the channel access token. Please check it and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to LINE API. Check your network connection.
error.confirm_required: Please tick the checkbox to confirm the webhook is set up before continuing.

abort.no_external_url: No external URL is configured for Home Assistant. Please set an external URL in Settings, System, Network and try again.

add_recipient.title: Add Recipient
add_recipient.description: Have the recipient add your bot as a friend in LINE and send it any message. Once their message is received, this screen will automatically advance to the next step.

select_recipient.title: Select Recipient
select_recipient.description: Select the account to add. Select '[Clear all pending]' to discard all captured accounts.

name_recipient.title: Name Recipient
name_recipient.description:
Naming **{line_name}**.

Enter an ASCII name for use in Home Assistant (this becomes the entity ID). Optionally enter a display name shown in the HA UI — it can be in any language or include emoji.

data.recipient_name: Name in Home Assistant (e.g. David, Greta, Coolio)
data.add_another: Add another recipient after saving this one

rotate_token.title: Update Credentials
rotate_token.description:
Update your Channel Access Token and/or Channel Secret. Both fields are pre-filled with current values.

Note: the Channel Access Token is verified automatically. The Channel Secret cannot be verified by LINE's API. If recipients stop being discovered after updating, double-check your channel secret.

error.invalid_token: Could not verify the channel access token. Please check it and try again.
error.duplicate_name: A recipient with this name (or a very similar name) already exists.
error.duplicate_user_id: This LINE account has already been added.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to LINE API. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_name: Name must contain only letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens and underscores. No emoji or non-English characters.

abort.no_recipients: There are no recipients to remove.

progress.waiting_for_message: Have the recipient add your bot as a friend in LINE and send it any message. Once their message is received, this screen will automatically advance to the next step.
